user.title: BookStack connection

book.title: Pick target book
book.description: Which book should Home Assistant sync into? Manually added content inside pages will be preserved.

reauth_confirm.title: Refresh BookStack token
reauth_confirm.description: BookStack rejected the API token for {base_url}. Create a fresh token in BookStack and paste the ID + secret here - the URL and target book stay the same.

reconfigure.title: Adjust BookStack connection
reconfigure.description: Change URL, token or TLS setting for this BookStack link. The target book and all page mappings are preserved. The URL must point at the same BookStack instance as before.

error.auth: API token rejected or missing permissions.
error.no_books: No book found in this BookStack instance. Create a target book first.
error.unknown: Unexpected error - check the Home Assistant log.
error.base_url_invalid_scheme: URL must start with http:// or https://.

abort.already_configured: This BookStack instance is already configured.
abort.reconfigure_successful: Connection updated - BookStack Sync has been reconfigured.
abort.url_mismatch: The new URL points at a different BookStack instance. Please remove the original entry and add it fresh.

run_now.name: Sync now
run_now.description: Trigger a sync immediately without waiting for the interval.

preview.name: Sync preview
preview.description: Logs which pages would be created/updated without writing anything to BookStack.
